case_title: CAPITAL ONE, N.A. VS. GUILLERMO GUAJARDO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-01-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 68663382) TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100207035)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY REGARDING NONMILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 68663382) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 68663382) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT GUAJARDO, GUILLERMO DOES 1 THROUGH 5, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-20-2023
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 68663382) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.
DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 68663382) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-01-2023 CONTINUED TO OCT-31-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-31-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
